name: Job-en
ddl: CREATE TABLE "Job-en" (Key INTEGER, "Unknown1" INTEGER, "Unknown2" TEXT, "Name" TEXT, "Unknown4" TEXT, "Description" TEXT, "Unknown6" TEXT, "jobtype+Id" INTEGER, "Unknown8" INTEGER, "jobcommand+Id" INTEGER, "Unknown10" INTEGER, "Unknown11" INTEGER, "TexturePartsIndex" INTEGER, "uijobabilityhelp+Id" INTEGER, "egg+Id" INTEGER, "Unknown15" INTEGER, "HideJobTree" INTEGER);
rows: This job serves as the foundation for all others. Ramza's Mettle job command grants the essential squire abilities of Fundaments, as well as others that are unique to him.
This job serves as the foundation for all others. Ramza's Mettle job command grants the essential squire abilities of Fundaments, as well as others that are unique to him.

Ramza has begun walking a path he believes in, and dedicates his life to the people, just as his father, the late Knight Gallant, once did. Ramza's Mettle job command grants the essential squire abilities of Fundaments, as well as others that are unique to him.
This job serves as the foundation for all others. Delita's Mettle job command grants the essential squire abilities of Fundaments, as well as others that are unique to him.

A knight of the faith baptized by the Church. Delita's Holy Sword job command allows him to use his blessed blade to strike while simultaneously inflicting status ailments, and includes some techniques unique to him.
This job serves as the foundation for all others. Argath's Fundaments job command grants the essential squire abilities, as well as others that are unique to him.
A holy warrior who upholds the teachings of the gods. The ark knight's job command Blade of Ruin grants powerful attacks that can devastate an opponent's attributes.

A knight of transcendent skill who wears armor inscribed with magick runes of ancient and mysterious power. The rune knight's job command Swordsmanship includes techniques from both the Holy Sword and Unyielding Blade job commands.
A member of the royal family and an heir to the throne. The princess's job command Holy Magicks utilizes powerful spells for recovery and protection.
A peerless warrior who stands above his fellow knights. The sword saint's job command Swordplay is the culmination of sword mastery, and enables the use of all sword techniques.
Wielder of the Holy Dragon's power, which harbors hidden memories. The dragonkin's job command Dragon manifests this power to produce myriad miraculous effects.
A high-ranking member of the clergy charged with hunting down heretics. The celebrant's job command Priest Magicks enables spells that heal wounds and relieve status ailments.
A fallen knight who has turned his back on the light of the gods. The job command Fell Sword enables the fell knight's cursed blade to leech an opponent's life force.
An assassin able to bend the laws of nature with forbidden techniques. The job command Nether Mantra allows the netherseer to perform unique attacks with an otherworldly power distinct from magick.
A true believer in the power of the divine. Alma's Holy Magicks job command utilizes powerful spells for recovery and protection, including some that are unique to her.

A learned augur capable of reading the movements of celestial bodies. The astrologer's job command Astrology harnesses the stars' influence upon men's fates to enact great change upon the battlefield.
An engineer striving to revive lost technologies. The job command Aimed Shot allows the machinist to strike specific parts of the target's body to impede their movement.
A fallen knight who has turned his back on the light of the gods. The job command Fell Sword enables the fell knight's cursed blade to leech an opponent's life force.
An assassin able to bend the laws of nature with forbidden techniques. The job command Sky Mantra allows the skyseer to perform unique attacks with an arcane power distinct from magick.
An assassin able to bend the laws of nature with forbidden techniques. The job command Nether Mantra allows the netherseer to perform unique attacks with an otherworldly power distinct from magick.
A holy warrior who upholds the teachings of the gods. The ark knight's job command Sword Spirit unleashes the seething spirit within a katana as a blast of energy.
A knight of the faith baptized by the Church. The job command Holy Sword allows the holy knight to use their blessed blade to strike while simultaneously inflicting status ailments.
A pious knight trained and sworn to protect the Church. The job command Spellblade allows the templar to use their magicked blade to instantly inflict status ailments on an opponent.
A pious knight clad in immaculate armor. The job command Holy Sword allows the white knight to use their untarnished blade to strike while simultaneously inflicting status ailments.
An engineer striving to revive lost technologies. The job command Aimed Shot allows the machinist to strike specific parts of the target's body to impede their movement.

A devout knight who is sworn to the Father and fights as a member of the clergy. The divine knight's job command Unyielding Blade enables puissant sword techniques that strike while simultaneously destroying equipment.

A devout knight who is sworn to the Father and fights as a member of the clergy. The divine knight's job command Unyielding Blade enables puissant sword techniques that strike while simultaneously destroying equipment.

A warrior sworn to the service of the Father. The job command Arts of War sees the nightblade use the ghostly, glowing edge of their sword to destroy an opponent's equipment or devastate their attributes.
A magick user who wields a multitude of arcane incantations. The job command Magick Arts allows the sorcerer to cast powerful spells from the pinnacle of all magickal disciplines.
A pious knight clad in immaculate armor. The job command Holy Sword allows the white knight to use their untarnished blade to strike while simultaneously inflicting status ailments.
An assassin able to bend the laws of nature with forbidden techniques. The job command Sky Mantra allows the skyseer to perform unique attacks with an arcane power distinct from magick.

A devout knight who is sworn to the Father and fights as a member of the clergy. The divine knight's job command Unyielding Blade enables puissant sword techniques that strike while simultaneously destroying equipment.
An engineer striving to revive lost technologies. The job command Aimed Shot allows the machinist to strike specific parts of the target's body to impede their movement.
A true believer in the power of the divine. Alma's Holy Magicks job command utilizes powerful spells for recovery and protection, including some that are unique to her.
A diabolical killer trained by an order of assassins. The job command Subdual Arts allows the assassin to inflict all manner of status ailments to quickly send opponents to their graves.
A diabolical killer trained by an order of assassins. The job command Subdual Arts allows the assassin to inflict all manner of status ailments to quickly send opponents to their graves.

A devout knight who is sworn to the Father and fights as a member of the clergy. The divine knight's job command Unyielding Blade enables puissant sword techniques that strike while simultaneously destroying equipment.
A true believer in the power of the divine. Alma's Holy Magicks job command utilizes powerful spells for recovery and protection, including some that are unique to her.
An otherworldly traveler whose origin is shrouded in mystery. The soldier's job command Limit harnesses power pushed to the limits to unleash devastating strikes.
A holy warrior who upholds the teachings of the gods. The ark knight's job command Blade of Ruin grants powerful attacks that can devastate an opponent's attributes.
A knight of the faith baptized by the Church. The job command Holy Sword allows the holy knight to use their blessed blade to strike while simultaneously inflicting status ailments.
A once-living warrior trained in the ways of the sword. The knight's job command Arts of War enables the use of abilities that destroy equipment or devastate attributes.
A once-living specialist at ranged combat using the bow and arrow. The archer's job command Aim enables attacks that deal greater damage proportionate to the time spent aiming.
A once-living mage who manipulates elemental forces. The black mage's job command Black Magicks enables the use of a variety of offensive elemental magicks.
A once-living mage capable of temporal and spatial manipulation. The time mage's job command Time Magicks enables the use of magicks that affect the movement and turn order of enemies and allies.
A once-living mage who bends the forces of the cosmos to their will. The mystic's job command Mystic Arts enables the manipulation of the enemy's mind and body to impede their ability to fight.
A once-living mage who summons espers from the spirit world. The summoner's job command Summon calls forth espers to unleash a wide range of magicks that distinguish between friend and foe.
A divine dragon encountered within the coal mines of Gollund. The Holy Dragon's job command Breath annihilates foes with breath attacks in three different elements.
This job serves as the foundation for all others. The job command Fundaments provides the squire with basic battle abilities.
An expert in the use of restoratives. The chemist's job command Items enables the use of healing items in battle.
A warrior trained in the ways of the sword. The knight's job command Arts of War enables the use of abilities that destroy equipment or devastate attributes.
A specialist at ranged combat using the bow and arrow. The archer's job command Aim enables attacks that deal damage proportionate to the time spent aiming.
A warrior who is skilled at unarmed combat. The monk's job command Martial Arts comprises a wide range of abilities, including a variety of attacks and simple healing techniques.
A mage who channels divine forces. The white mage's job command White Magicks enables the use of healing and strengthening magicks.
A mage who manipulates elemental forces. The black mage's job command Black Magicks enables the use of a variety of offensive elemental magicks.
A mage capable of temporal and spatial manipulation. The time mage's job command Time Magicks enables the use of magicks that affect the movement and turn order of enemies and allies.
A mage who summons espers from the spirit world. The summoner's job command Summon calls forth espers to unleash a wide range of magicks that distinguish between friend and foe.
A nimble warrior who excels at thievery. The thief's job command Steal enables the theft of all manner of possessions, from equipment to an enemy's very heart.
A warrior skilled in the art of rhetoric. The job command Speechcraft allows the orator to influence the behavior of enemies and allies through the power of spoken words.
A mage who bends the forces of the cosmos to their will. The mystic's job command Mystic Arts enables the manipulation of an enemy's mind and body to impede their ability to fight.
A warrior who manifests the dormant power of the land. The geomancer's job command Geomancy enables a multitude of attacks that utilize the terrain beneath one's feet.
A warrior who is skilled with the polearm. The job command Jump allows the dragoon to use soaring jumps to avoid being targeted before diving down to strike the enemy.
A sword master who follows a warrior ethic from a foreign land. The job command Iaido allows the samurai to release the spirit in a katana to attack enemies and aid allies.
A warrior who excels at stealth and subterfuge. The ninja's job command Throw allows weapons to be thrown at faraway enemies.
A learned warrior whose calculations render any and all the target of their magicks. The arithmetician's job command Arithmeticks employs algorithms and casts magicks instantaneously.
A warrior whose very voice is a weapon. The bard's job command Bardsong provides a repertoire of exquisite melodies that support allies in battle.
A warrior whose alluring movements are a weapon. The dancer's job command Dance provides a repertoire of mysterious dances that hinder the enemy in battle.
A warrior who has abandoned their own identity. The mime's job command Mimic allows the actions of allies to be imitated automatically.
A bird known for its powerful legs, bred throughout Ivalice as a reliable mode of transport.
The sole variety of chocobo known to be capable of flight. It can take to the skies even when bearing a rider.
A variety of chocobo possessed of superior battle abilities, considered to make the finest mount.
Identifiable by its large ears and upturned nose, this humanoid creature is well muscled and stronger than its diminutive size would suggest. Weak against ice.
A variety of goblin that dwells in close proximity to humans, leading to frequent clashes between the two races. Weak against ice.
A variety of goblin known for its aggressive nature, said to be the most dangerous among its kind. Weak against ice.
A creature enveloped by raging flames that feed on the highly flammable fluid exuded by its body. Absorbs fire, halves damage from ice, and is weak against water.
A variety of bomb enveloped in extremely hot flames. The gas within its body is of lesser density than air. Absorbs fire, halves damage from ice, and is weak against water.
A variety of bomb that absorbs heat from its surroundings, resulting in the unusual hue of its flames. Absorbs fire, halves damage from ice, and is weak against water.
A nimble quadruped capable of bounding effortlessly across steep terrain. It lurks in the shadows as it hunts its prey. Weak against earth.
A variety of panther that uses the venom it secretes from its fangs to inflict prey with status ailments. Weak against earth.
A variety of panther with a fondness for feeding on the blood of its prey, especially that of humans. Weak against earth.
Though humanoid in appearance, this monster has no skeleton, and its skin is coated in viscous slime. Absorbs water, and is weak against lightning.
A variety of piscodaemon, this monster possesses high intelligence and is capable of comprehending human speech. Absorbs water, and is weak against lightning.
A variety of piscodaemon that is able to manipulate the minds of its prey, causing intense fear and confusion. Absorbs water, and is weak against lightning.
An undead being of fleshless bone, it rises again and again no matter how many times it is felled. Absorbs darkness, and is weak against fire and holy.
A variety of undead skeleton possessed of ice-cold bones, said to journey between the worlds of the living and the dead. Absorbs darkness, and is weak against fire and holy.
A variety of undead skeleton whose soul is cursed to endure an eternal, tormented existence. Absorbs darkness, and is weak against fire and holy.
An undead, incorporeal being that floats above the ground. Its touch fills the living with tainted energies. Absorbs darkness, and is weak against fire and holy.
A variety of ghoul whose hands are inexplicably slimy despite lacking corporeal form. Absorbs darkness, and is weak against fire and holy.
A variety of ghoul that harbors an abiding fixation on the corporeal world, and attacks any living soul it encounters. Absorbs darkness, and is weak against fire and holy.
A creature that possesses a single gigantic eye. Its baleful stare ever searches for would-be prey. Halves damage from wind, and is weak against ice.
A variety of floating eye whose unsettling glare harbors tremendous magickal power. Halves damage from wind, and is weak against ice.
A variety of floating eye whose compelling gaze ushers hapless souls to their doom. Halves damage from wind, and is weak against ice.
A species of bird that mainly dwells on the ground, and attacks unsuspecting prey with its enormous wings. Halves damage from wind, and is weak against earth.
A variety of jura aevis, this bird derives its name from the hardness of its razor-sharp beak. Halves damage from wind, and is weak against earth.
A variety of jura aevis that possesses powerful magick, feared for its ability to petrify its foes. Halves damage from wind, and is weak against earth.
An endearing creature whose unflagging tenacity is the source of encouragement for many a soul.
A variety of pig that is aware of how adorable it is, and believes that it can get away with anything.
A variety of pig that is undaunted in the face of adversity, a trait for which it is admired even among its own kind.
A sentient, ambulating tree whose leaves are said to harbor a mystical energy. Absorbs earth, and is weak against fire.
A variety of dryad endowed with consciousness by the spirits. It fights to protect the forest where it was born. Absorbs earth, and is weak against fire.
A variety of dryad said to be born when woodland spirits take them as a corporeal vessel. Absorbs earth, and is weak against fire.
A beast with the body of a man and the head of a bull, said to have been created when an evil spirit possessed a cow. Weak against water.
A variety of wisenkin that is known to acquire tools from human settlements and use them as weapons. Weak against water.
A variety of wisenkin that employs its hulking frame in unbridled rampages, and is duly feared among travelers. Weak against water.
This repulsive creature exudes a foul stench, and will devour all that comes before its gaping maw. Weak against ice.
A variety of malboro that prefers humid climes, and is often observed living in herds. Weak against ice.
A variety of malboro believed to have arisen via mutation. Its ecology remains shrouded in mystery. Weak against ice.
A great beast of savage temperament that brings its imposing frame to bear upon its prey.
A variety of behemoth whose noble mane and magnificent horns led to it being dubbed king among its kind.
Many a hunter once set out in pursuit of this dread variety of behemoth; few returned to tell the tale.
The most ferocious of all beasts, it is said that a dragon will seek to destroy all that meets its gaze.
A variety of dragon covered head to tail in adamant scales that are frozen over like ice. Absorbs ice, and is weak against fire.
A variety of dragon whose all-consuming flames have reduced innumerable souls to ash. Absorbs fire, and is weak against ice.
A dread beast possessed of three heads, each of which shares its consciousness with the others. Weak against wind and ice.
A variety of hydra that is as intelligent as it is savage, and dispatches its prey with unsettling calmness. Weak against wind and ice.
The magick-replete breath of this fearsome variety of hydra has wreaked havoc upon many a battlefield. Weak against wind and ice.
An arcane beast with sharply clawed hands and feet and two prominent horns. The job command Spellcraft enables a wide variety of magicks, from offensive to healing.
A mechanical construct built by a lost civilization to perform labor. The job command Tasks enables attacks from various distances, but at the cost of recoil damage to the unit.
An arcane beast with powerful legs and a long, slender tail. The job command Bio grants the use of potent toxic mists that inflict a host of status ailments.
A member of a race of daemons that has existed since the age of myth. The job command Dark Arts harnesses dread powers capable of laying all to waste.
A member of a race of daemons that has existed since the age of myth. The job command Demon Magicks enables attacks with fellest powers befitting the wielder's name.
A nimble quadruped capable of bounding effortlessly across steep terrain. It lurks in the shadows as it hunts its prey. Weak against earth.
Identifiable by its large ears and upturned nose, this humanoid creature is well muscled and stronger than its diminutive size would suggest. Weak against ice.
A variety of goblin that dwells in close proximity to humans, leading to frequent clashes between the two races. Weak against ice.
A creature enveloped by raging flames that feed on the highly flammable fluid exuded by its body. Absorbs fire, halves damage from ice, and is weak against water.
A bird known for its powerful legs, bred throughout Ivalice as a reliable mode of transport.
